## Summary
- enforce strict revise card contract checks for candidate prose readiness
- harden queue/cockpit rendering to use validator-backed candidate text path
- ensure diagnostics remain separate from A/B/C manuscript prose
- update focused unit/smoke tests for contract and V2 clients
